zh.Sybforde Gore, Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire,: 英國奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福
zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Parker of Sybforde於1480年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福。她於1509年與John Tredwell在英國奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1530年享年50歲。

zh-hans.Sybforde Gore, Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire,: 英国奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Parker of Sybforde于1480年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福。她于1509年与John Tredwell在英国奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1530年享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Parker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English parker ‘park-keeper’ (Old French parquier, parchier), an officer employed to look after deer and other game in a hunting park (see Park 1). This surname is also very common among African Americans. It has also been recorded since medieval times in Ireland.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish names.

variants.name: Parkman
meanings: occupational name from Middle English park ‘enclosure, game preserve, park’ (Old French parc) + man, sometimes for one living at or near such a place but probably more often denoting someone employed to look after after deer and other game in a hunting park; compare Parker .
occupational name denoting the servant (Middle English man) of someone called Park (see Park 2).

variants.name: Parkerson
meanings: English: from the occupational name Parker + patronymic -son.

variants.name: Parkey
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): dialect pronunciation of Parker . Parker has a long history in Macclesfield, Manchester, and Bridgnorth.

variants.name: Park
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Young, Sang, Sung, Yong, Jung, Jong, Chan, Jae, Jin, Kwang, Kyung, Myung, Chong, Chang, Chung, Byung, Min, Moon, Chul, Hae, Jeong, Dae, Seong, Myong.

English and Scottish: from Middle English and Older Scots parc, parke, perk ‘park, enclosure’ (Old French parc), often referring to the grounds of a manor house or a deer park where the lord hunted. The name was probably synonymous with Parker , denoting an officer who looked after a park for the lord of the manor.
English and Scottish: from a medieval pet form of the personal name   Peter  . Compare   Parkin  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Parker of Sybforde was born in 1480, in Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. She married John Tredwell in 1509, in Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1530, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Parker of Sybforde est née en 1480, à Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé John Tredwell en 1509, à Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1530, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Parker of Sybforde wurde 1480 in Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1509 in Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England John Tredwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1530 im Alter von 50 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Parker of Sybforde è nata il nel 1480 nel Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato John Tredwell nel 1509, nel Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1530, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.Sybforde Gore, Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire,: イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスワルクリフ
ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Parker of Sybfordeは1480年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスワルクリフで生まれた。1509年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスワルクリフでJohn Tredwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1530年に50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Parker of Sybforde(은)는 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스월c리프에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1509년 영국 스퍼드실르 스월c리프에서 John Tredwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1530년 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Parker of Sybforde nasceu em 1480, em Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com John Tredwell em 1509, em Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1530, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Parker of Sybforde родилась в 1480 г. в местности свалклифф, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Tredwell в 1509 г. в местности свалклифф, оксфордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1530 г. в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Parker of Sybforde nació en 1480, en Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con John Tredwell en 1509, en Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1530, a la edad de 50 años.
